iran_nuke.notes: Day 18 13:04 - CRITICAL 54. Iran explicitly refuses all negotiation channels. Prolonged war desperation risk rising. Proliferation incentive grows as regime survival threatened by 6000+ US combat missions.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 18 13:04 - IMMINENT 100 (capped). 6000+ US combat missions, 100+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Iran explicitly rejects ceasefire/negotiation. Brent $106. Iran calls fuel depot strikes ecocide. Germany flatly refuses Hormuz deployment. 1348 Iran civilians dead, 850 Lebanon, 13 US troops.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 18 13:04 - IMMINENT 100 (capped). Israel Katz announces ground maneuver - formal escalation from limited ground ops. Qantara strike kills 4 incl 2 children. 850+ dead, 800K displaced. Week 3, expanding offensive.

turkey.notes: Day 18 13:04 - IMMINENT 88. Germany refuses Hormuz: not our war. NATO alliance strain deepening. Japan/Australia refuse ships. Incirlik narrative intensifying. Trump threatens NATO future.

india.notes: Day 18 12:00 — ELEVATED 25. India evacuates 550 nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing. No escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 18 13:04 - IMMINENT 86. NATO rift widens (Germany refuses Hormuz). Putin benefits from Western disunity. France sends SAMP/T NG to Ukraine.

china.notes: Day 18 12:00 — CRITICAL 34 (w/coupling). Trump may delay Xi summit. China stance on Hormuz unclear. US-China friction over ME crisis.

north_korea.notes: Day 18 13:04 - IMMINENT 76. Kim observed 10+ missile test timed after THAAD redeployment. Strategic gap exploitation. No new signals in past hour.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 18 13:04 - IMMINENT 100 (capped). Russia barrages Ukraine, 6 killed, 760 Russian losses in 24h. France SAMP/T NG deployment. Zelensky awaits trilateral talks.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped). Kandahar strikes continue. 118K displaced. Deadliest phase. 100 (capped).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: DETERIORATING (Day 18 14:04): Iran president escalates rhetoric — threatens more US target attacks, calls unconditional surrender a 'dream to their grave.' Tehran oil depot bombed. Pentagon confirms 7th US death. Hormuz 'closed to enemies' clarification. No ceasefire channels. Zero diplomatic progress. Global score 93 STABLE at IMMINENT.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM says Hormuz 'closed to our enemies' — clarifies selective blockade
latest_news.text: Iran FM Araghchi: 'The strait is open, but closed to our enemies.' Tehran allows safe passage for select countries while blockading US/Israeli-linked shipping.

latest_news.headline: Pentagon identifies 7th US service member killed in Iran conflict
latest_news.text: Pentagon identifies seventh US service member killed since campaign began Feb 28. 13 total US military deaths reported elsewhere (including contractors).

latest_news.headline: Iranian president threatens more attacks on US targets, rejects surrender
latest_news.text: Iranian president on US demand of unconditional surrender: 'They should take that dream to their grave.' Threatens more attacks on US targets in region.

latest_news.headline: More Israeli strikes hit Tehran — oil depot and refinery bombed
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes bomb Tehran oil depot and refinery. Smoke covers parts of Tehran. Continued escalation of strikes on Iranian capital.

latest_news.headline: Zelensky blocks drone sales, awaits Trump-Putin peace talks resumption
latest_news.text: Zelensky blocks Ukrainian drone exports as he waits for Trump to resume peace talks with Putin. Russia attacks Moscow airports with drones. EU imposes Bucha war crimes sanctions.

latest_news.headline: Russia continues aerial barrage — 6 killed, energy infrastructure targeted
latest_news.text: Russia hammers Ukraine with missiles and drones. 6 killed including 5 in Kyiv region. Energy infrastructure, residential buildings, schools damaged. 90 of 97 drones intercepted.

outlook: CRITICAL DETERIORATION (Day 18 14:04) - Global war probability 93%. (1) IRAN CONVENTIONAL IMMINENT 100: Tehran oil depot bombed, Iran president threatens more US attacks, rejects surrender. Hormuz selective blockade continues. Brent $106. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON IMMINENT 100: Ground maneuver continues, 850+ dead. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE IMMINENT 100: Ongoing barrage, 6 killed. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN IMMINENT 100. (5) DPRK IMMINENT 68. (6) RUSSIA-NATO IMMINENT 84. (7) TURKEY IMMINENT 92. (8) IRAN NUCLEAR CRITICAL 49: No-negotiation path persists. KEY: Iran president escalates rhetoric — threatens more attacks, calls surrender demand a 'dream.' Tehran oil infrastructure bombed. 7th US service member identified. No de-escalation channels active.
